Home/ Platform/ Prompt Forge/ Chat Unify integration

Forge · run real work

Forge inside Chat Unify

SourceA is an AI execution platform — real builds, automations, and agent workflows, with a verifiable receipt on every run. Paste what you want on Home, Forge scopes the job, your agent runs it — one desk, one record.

How it works under the hood

Pipeline in Chat Unify

Open Chat Unify.app (Mac control panel :13023). On Home, paste founder language in the quick paste strip — Forge runs as pipeline three alongside Verify & Act and Proof Pack.

Closed cycle

Forge → agent run → check → record. Each step has a name so work does not get lost between tools.

Version

UI 4.1+ ships Forge wiring; restart the app after bundle sync if the tab is stale.

Forge this job

Email raw founder language — one bounded mission back.

forge@sourcea.app →
